headline: Piper Sandler Downgrades The Hartford Insurance Gr to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $146
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   downgrades The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) from Overweight to Neutral and lowers the price target from $148 to $146.
